description: Oura Ring native metrics dashboard. Queries the raw Oura* measurements. Every timeseries panel includes a 14-day personal rolling baseline ('Your typical'). Panels marked with '_normalRangeMetric' also get a green/yellow/red population band that the fetcher stamps in on startup from USER_AGE / USER_SEX env vars (see src/garmin_grafana/normal_ranges.py).

panels.description: AI-generated wellness summary updated each fetch cycle. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env.

options.defaultContent:
Waiting for AI summary. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and wait for a fetch cycle, or click Regenerate.

↻ Regenerate now

targets.query: SELECT last("summary") AS "summary" FROM "AIHealthSummary" WHERE "dashboard" = 'oura_health'

panels.title: AI Wellness Summary

panels.description: Latest Oura Sleep Score (0-100).

targets.query: SELECT last("sleep_score") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Sleep Score

panels.description: Latest Oura Readiness Score (0-100).

targets.query: SELECT last("score") FROM "OuraReadiness" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Readiness Score

panels.description: Latest Oura Activity Score (0-100).

targets.query: SELECT last("score") FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Activity Score

panels.description: Average HRV during sleep over the selected window.

targets.query: SELECT mean("average_hrv") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Avg HRV (window)

panels.description: Nightly sleep composition: deep / light / REM / awake, stacked to total time in bed.

targets.query: SELECT mean("deep_sleep_duration") / 3600 FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("light_sleep_duration") / 3600 FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("rem_sleep_duration") / 3600 FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("awake_time") / 3600 FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Sleep stages (stacked)

panels.description: Oura Sleep Score and measured efficiency (both 0-100). Green band = good sleep efficiency (>=85%). Dashed line = your 14-day rolling typical.

targets.query: SELECT mean("sleep_score") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("efficiency") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("sleep_score"), 14) FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("efficiency"), 14) FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Sleep score & efficiency

panels.description: Overnight HRV average and lowest heart rate — Oura's best recovery indicators. Dashed lines = your 14-day rolling typical for each.

targets.query: SELECT mean("average_hrv") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("lowest_heart_rate") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("average_hrv"), 14) FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("lowest_heart_rate"), 14) FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: HRV & lowest sleeping HR

panels.description: Last night's Time Asleep (deep+light+REM). Should match the Oura app's 'Time asleep' header value exactly.

targets.query: SELECT last("total_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Time Asleep

panels.description: Last night's Total Duration (time in bed). Should match the Oura app's 'Total duration' value exactly.

targets.query: SELECT last("time_in_bed") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Time in Bed

panels.description: Last night's Awake time. Should match the Oura app's 'Awake' value exactly.

targets.query: SELECT last("awake_time") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Awake

panels.description: Last night's Sleep Efficiency (% of time in bed spent asleep). Should match the Oura app value.

targets.query: SELECT last("efficiency") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Sleep Efficiency

panels.description: Last night's Deep sleep. Should match the Oura app's 'Deep' value.

targets.query: SELECT last("deep_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Deep

panels.description: Last night's Light sleep. Should match the Oura app's 'Light' value.

targets.query: SELECT last("light_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Light

panels.description: Last night's REM sleep. Should match the Oura app's 'REM' value.

targets.query: SELECT last("rem_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: REM

panels.description: Last night's average sleeping heart rate. Should match the Oura app's 'Average heart rate' value.

targets.query: SELECT last("average_heart_rate") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Sleeping HR avg

panels.description: Last night's lowest heart rate. Should match the Oura app's 'Lowest heart rate' value.

targets.query: SELECT last("lowest_heart_rate") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Lowest HR

panels.description: Last night's average HRV. Should match the Oura app's 'Average HRV' value.

targets.query: SELECT last("average_hrv") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Avg HRV

panels.description: Last night's average SpO2 (blood oxygen). Oura flags values below ~95% as worth investigating.

targets.query: SELECT last("spo2_avg") FROM "OuraSpO2" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: SpO2 (last night)

panels.description: How long it took to fall asleep after going to bed.

targets.query: SELECT last("latency") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Sleep latency

panels.description: Last night's average respiratory rate in breaths per minute.

targets.query: SELECT last("average_breath") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Avg breath rate

panels.description: Number of restless periods Oura detected through the night.

targets.query: SELECT last("restless_periods") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Restless periods

panels.description: Breathing Disturbance Index — frequency of breathing irregularities Oura detected during sleep. Lower is better.

targets.query: SELECT last("breathing_disturbance_index") FROM "OuraSpO2" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: BDI (last night)

panels.description: Nightly average SpO2 with a 14-day rolling baseline.

targets.query: SELECT mean("spo2_avg") FROM "OuraSpO2" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("spo2_avg"), 14) FROM "OuraSpO2" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: SpO2 average (trend)

panels.description: Breathing Disturbance Index over time — lower is better. Dashed line is your 14-day rolling typical.

targets.query: SELECT mean("breathing_disturbance_index") FROM "OuraSpO2" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("breathing_disturbance_index"), 14) FROM "OuraSpO2" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Breathing Disturbance Index (trend)

targets.query: SELECT count("total_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraNap" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT sum("total_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraNap" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("total_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraNap" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT max("total_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraNap" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Nap duration per session

targets.query: SELECT "total_sleep_duration" / 60 FROM "OuraNap" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.description: Each bar is one nap session detected by Oura. Hover for duration; cross-reference with UnifiedSleep timeseries above to see how naps shift overnight sleep patterns.

targets.query: SELECT count("total_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraNap" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "sleep_type"

SELECT "sleep_type" AS type, "total_sleep_duration"/60 AS duration_min, "time_in_bed"/60 AS in_bed_min, "efficiency", "latency"/60 AS latency_min, "average_heart_rate" AS hr_avg, "average_hrv" AS hrv FROM "OuraNap" WHERE $timeFilter ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 50

panels.description: Daily Oura Readiness Score. Dashed line = your 14-day rolling typical.

targets.query: SELECT mean("score") FROM "OuraReadiness" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("score"), 14) FROM "OuraReadiness" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Readiness score

panels.description: Body temperature deviation from your personal baseline (°C). Sustained rises often precede illness or overtraining. Dashed line = your 14-day rolling typical.

targets.query: SELECT mean("temperature_deviation") FROM "OuraReadiness" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("temperature_trend_deviation") FROM "OuraReadiness" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("temperature_deviation"), 14) FROM "OuraReadiness" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Body temperature deviation

panels.description: Intraday heart rate samples from Oura (captured during rest/sleep windows).

targets.query: SELECT mean("heartRate") FROM "OuraHRIntraday" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)

panels.title: Heart rate (intraday)

panels.description: Daily step count. Green band = 7500+ (Tudor-Locke 'somewhat active' or better). Dashed line = your 14-day rolling typical.

targets.query: SELECT mean("steps") FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("steps"), 14) FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Steps

panels.description: Total vs. active calories burned. Dashed lines = your 14-day rolling typical.

targets.query: SELECT mean("total_calories") FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("active_calories") FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("total_calories"), 14) FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("active_calories"), 14) FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Calories (total & active)

panels.description: How your day was distributed across intensity levels. Stacked hours per day.

targets.query: SELECT mean("high_activity_time") / 3600 FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("medium_activity_time") / 3600 FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("low_activity_time") / 3600 FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("sedentary_time") / 3600 FROM "OuraDailyActivity" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Activity intensity breakdown (stacked)

panels.description: Oura's daily high-stress vs. high-recovery time, stacked as hours per day.

targets.query: SELECT mean("stress_high") / 3600 FROM "OuraStress" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("recovery_high") / 3600 FROM "OuraStress" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Stress vs Recovery (stacked)

panels.description: Time Oura classified as high-stress today.

targets.query: SELECT last("stress_high") FROM "OuraStress" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Stress high (today)

panels.description: Time Oura classified as high-recovery today.

targets.query: SELECT last("recovery_high") FROM "OuraStress" WHERE "Source"='Oura' AND time > now() - 40h

panels.title: Recovery high (today)

panels.description: Oura's estimated VO2 max (ml/kg/min). Dashed line is your 14-day rolling typical.

targets.query: SELECT mean("vo2_max") FROM "OuraVO2Max" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("vo2_max"), 14) FROM "OuraVO2Max" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: VO2 max trend

targets.query: SELECT mean("average_breath") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source" = 'Oura' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("average_breath"), 14) FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source" = 'Oura' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)
SELECT mean("restless_periods") FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source" = 'Oura' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT moving_average(mean("restless_periods"), 14) FROM "OuraSleep" WHERE "Source" = 'Oura' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1d) fill(null)

panels.title: Last night's sleep is from

targets.query: SELECT last("total_sleep_duration") FROM "OuraSleep"

panels.description: Timestamp of the most recent OuraSleep record — confirms which night the stats below are about (in case the ring wasn't worn last night).

title: Oura Ring Health
